title: centaurea breviceps
intro: Centaurea breviceps, also known as the small-headed knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Centaurea breviceps include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat wounds and skin conditions. Centaurea breviceps can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations.
